note: Empirical p-values are one-sided: fraction of random D trials >= C (deletion_rate) or <= C (mean_prob). Min achievable p = 1/n_random_trials. q_fdr is Benjamini-Hochberg corrected across all pairs and files.

aggregate.note: deletion_rate_diff > 0 means English vector deletes concept more than random. mean_prob_diff > 0 means English vector lowers concept probability more than random.
